top_findings.title: Archived run_dir contains no source code — deliverable is unreproducible from the archive
top_findings.evidence: run_dir has only TASK.md/stack.json/scores.json/logs; no Cargo.toml, src/, tests/, or README.md. The scored code (test_coverage=1.0) lives in the self-repair clone temp workspace retort-0f2422d0999c, which was not archived.
top_findings.suggestion: Fix the archiver to copy the winning self-repair clone into runs/<cell>/rep1 instead of the empty first-attempt dir.

top_findings.title: First attempt produced zero files — local hermes write-guard refused all writes under /private/var/folders
top_findings.evidence: _agent_stdout.log: 'Refusing to write to sensitive system path: /private/var/folders/.../retort-d88eeb957eb5/Cargo.toml'. First-attempt workspace has no source and no git commits; run only passed via the self-repair clone.
top_findings.suggestion: Whitelist the retort-local temp workspace root in the file-write guard so the agent can create source on the first attempt.
